global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with product details and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a product at a discounted price for a limited time.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'LuxShelf' in a modern font, placed at the top left.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular product display with two vertical rectangles representing shelves, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Product description
elements.description: Text below the product display that reads 'Your next favorite pick' in a bold, friendly font.

elements.label: $4.99 price
elements.description: A prominent price tag reading '$4.99' in a large, eye-catching font at the bottom center.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' in a bold font, located below the price.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large headline text stating 'Only this weekend' in a clear, attention-grabbing font at the center.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Only this weekend $4.99 Try for free

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in a simple font, placed at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, the product display is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
